SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.util

Class CryptoUtils

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.util.CryptoUtils
public class CryptoUtils extends Object
Encryption utilities for DeepViolet scan persistence. Provides AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption, DEK generation and wrapping, password-based key derivation, HMAC-SHA256, and machine key management.
Author:
Milton Smith

    Constructor
    Description

    Decrypt AES-256-GCM encrypted data.

  • Constructor Details

    • CryptoUtils

      public CryptoUtils()

  • Method Details

    • ensureEncryptionSeed

      public static void ensureEncryptionSeed()
      Ensure a machine encryption seed exists in global properties. Creates one if not present. Migrates from local properties if found.

    • getEncryptionSeed

      public static byte[] getEncryptionSeed()
      Retrieve the 32-byte machine encryption key.
      Returns:
      32-byte AES key, or null if not generated

    • encryptBytes

      public static byte[] encryptBytes(byte[] plaintext, byte[] key) throws GeneralSecurityException
      Encrypt plaintext with AES-256-GCM.
      Parameters:
      plaintext - data to encrypt
      key - 32-byte AES key
      Returns:
      IV (12 bytes) || ciphertext || GCM tag (16 bytes)
      Throws:
      GeneralSecurityException - on encryption failure

    • decryptBytes

      public static byte[] decryptBytes(byte[] data, byte[] key) throws GeneralSecurityException
      Decrypt AES-256-GCM encrypted data.
      Parameters:
      data - IV (12 bytes) || ciphertext || GCM tag (16 bytes)
      key - 32-byte AES key
      Returns:
      decrypted plaintext
      Throws:
      GeneralSecurityException - on decryption failure (wrong key, tampered data)

    • generateDek

      public static byte[] generateDek()
      Generate a random 32-byte Data Encryption Key.
      Returns:
      32 random bytes

    • wrapDek

      public static byte[] wrapDek(byte[] dek, byte[] kek) throws GeneralSecurityException
      Wrap (encrypt) a DEK with a KEK using AES-256-GCM.
      Parameters:
      dek - DEK to wrap
      kek - Key Encryption Key
      Returns:
      wrapped DEK (IV || ciphertext || tag)
      Throws:
      GeneralSecurityException - on wrapping failure

    • unwrapDek

      public static byte[] unwrapDek(byte[] wrappedDek, byte[] kek) throws GeneralSecurityException
      Unwrap (decrypt) a DEK with a KEK using AES-256-GCM.
      Parameters:
      wrappedDek - wrapped DEK (IV || ciphertext || tag)
      kek - Key Encryption Key
      Returns:
      unwrapped DEK
      Throws:
      GeneralSecurityException - on unwrapping failure (wrong KEK)

    • derivePasswordKek

      public static byte[] derivePasswordKek(char[] password, byte[] salt, int iterations) throws GeneralSecurityException
      Derive a 32-byte KEK from a password using PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256.
      Parameters:
      password - user-supplied password
      salt - random salt (16 bytes recommended)
      iterations - iteration count
      Returns:
      32-byte derived KEK
      Throws:
      GeneralSecurityException - on KDF failure

    • derivePasswordKek

      public static byte[] derivePasswordKek(char[] password, byte[] salt) throws GeneralSecurityException
      Derive a 32-byte KEK using the default iteration count.
      Throws:
      GeneralSecurityException

    • generateSalt

      public static byte[] generateSalt()
      Generate a random 16-byte salt.
      Returns:
      16 random bytes

    • hmacSha256

      public static byte[] hmacSha256(byte[] data, byte[] key) throws GeneralSecurityException
      Compute HMAC-SHA256 over data with the given key.
      Parameters:
      data - data to authenticate
      key - HMAC key
      Returns:
      32-byte HMAC
      Throws:
      GeneralSecurityException - on HMAC failure

    • sha256Hex

      public static String sha256Hex(byte[] data)
      Compute SHA-256 hash of data and return as lowercase hex string.
      Parameters:
      data - bytes to hash
      Returns:
      64-character lowercase hex string, or null on failure

    • getGlobalDir

      public static File getGlobalDir()
      Get the global configuration directory. Default: ~/.deepviolet/. Override with system property deepviolet.global.
      Returns:
      global directory
